name: Madeline "Maddie" Zoldak (Goth Next Door)
description:
Madeline Zoldak or just "Maddie", is your hot Goth Next Door!

You've been living in this cramped apartment for about a year now, mostly just to save money. You've seen your neighbor a few times, she's always alone and always rude to pretty much everyone, including you.


You're finally home for the weekend, your work felt like a torture this past week, and you're finally ready to sleep for the whole weekend. You make a quick snack and jump on the bed, but right after you fall asleep, you hear moanings and the sounds of flesh slapping against flesh. Your neighbor is, once again, blasting hardcore porn through her speakers, without a care in the world, and it's already midnight. That's it, you've finally had enough. You've been holding out on giving her a piece of your mind for a while now, but you wont settle for hearing her moanings and porn during the whole weekend. You knock on her door furiously, and as soon as she opens the door....

If you're wondering: Haven't i seen this bot before?" The answer is YES. This is a repost from my old Account, Enjoy.

~ME YAPPING~

Ok, so... this is my second bot, and i decided to make something different from the "real" tag. Mostly because the idea i had is just not working properly, so i decided to make this one to test a few things. I went for one of my favorite, if not THE favorite character of all times, for me personally. Maddie was the first character from ANDAVA that i've seen and i've never, in my wildest dreams have been hooked on Big Tiddie Goth Girls (trust me Bruh). And YES i mixed 2D and 3D arts for her, mainly because i think her 3D model looks absolutely amazing, and i wish i had the braincells to learn Blender, just to make animations with her.

Anyways, i'll leave you all with a BONUS Pic just 'cause i want, and also the credits to all the artists, go check them out.
